name: Oruka Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: Oruka Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel monoclonal antibody therapeutics for psoriasis and other inflammatory and immunology indications. Its lead program, ORKA-001, targets IL-23p19 with extended half-life YTE technology for infrequent dosing, and its co-lead program, ORKA-002, targets IL-17A/F for psoriasis, hidradenitis suppurativa, psoriatic arthritis, and other conditions. The company was formed through the merger of ARCA biopharma and Pre-Merger Oruka Therapeutics in August 2024.

products.name: ORKA-001
products.description: High affinity, extended half-life monoclonal antibody targeting IL-23p19 for treatment of moderate-to-severe psoriasis, designed for subcutaneous injection as infrequently as once or twice per year.

products.name: ORKA-002
products.description: High affinity, extended half-life monoclonal antibody targeting IL-17A and IL-17F for psoriasis, hidradenitis suppurativa, psoriatic arthritis, and other inflammatory conditions.

partnerships.description: Pre-Merger Oruka was incorporated to hold rights to certain intellectual property being developed by Paragon Therapeutics.
Pre-Merger Oruka was incorporated under the direction of Peter Harwin, a Founding Partner at Fairmount Funds Management LLC.
